_comment: Baseline of ACCEPTED parity gaps, keyed by feed id. A 'gap' is a MobilityData ERROR/WARNING notice code that our validator does NOT flag on the same feed. The parity test exits non-zero only when it finds a gap NOT listed here for that feed (a regression / newly-surfaced canonical rule). To accept a new gap intentionally, add its code to the feed's array and commit. Regenerate the suggested contents by running `npm run test:validator-parity -- --write-baseline`. INFO-severity notices are never gating.
